mapper.select: SELECT id, knowledge_id, category_id, chunk_index, chunk_total, content, start_offset, end_offset, is_summary, token_count, vector_bge_m3, vector_status, error_message, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM t_knowledge_chunk WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} AND is_active = #{isActive} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC

SELECT c.id, c.knowledge_id, c.category_id, c.chunk_index, c.chunk_total, c.content, c.start_offset, c.end_offset, c.is_summary, c.token_count, c.vector_bge_m3, c.vector_status, c.error_message, c.is_active, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM t_knowledge_chunk c INNER JOIN t_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = c.knowledge_id WHERE c.category_id = #{categoryId} AND c.is_active = 1 AND kb.deleted = 0 AND c.vector_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.knowledge_id, c.chunk_index
